# Nano Syllabus

Nano Syllabus is an AI co-pilot built around Nepal's curriculum, syllabus,
question banks, and teacher notes. Students preparing for SEE, NEB, IOE,
CEE, and Loksewa exams can ask doubts, revise chapters, and practise with
past papers — in English or Nepali.

## Who It's For
Students in Nepal preparing for:
- SEE (Class 10)
- NEB +2 (Class 11 and 12)
- IOE entrance exam
- CEE entrance exam
- Loksewa
Also used by teachers who want to build AI-powered study aids from their own notes.

## Key Capabilities
- Chapter-wise doubt solving in English and Nepali
- 10+ years of solved past papers for IOE, CEE, SEE, and NEB
- Adaptive quizzes that adjust to each learner's weak spots
- AI-built study planner tailored to an exam date
- Teacher AI Clone: an AI modelled on a specific teacher's style and notes
- Smart summaries: turn 30 pages into a 2-minute revision card
- Auto-generated flashcards from weak spots
- Progress analytics showing which topics need more work
- Voice mode: talk to your tutor on the way to school

## Products
- Study Companion: daily co-pilot for Class 6–12 (chapter notes, doubt solving, flashcards, progress tracking)
- Entrance Preparation: mock tests and analytics for IOE, CEE, KU, and Loksewa based on 10 years of papers
- Teacher AI Clone: personalised AI built from a teacher's own notes and voice
